name: Swrve
description: Swrve — real-time mobile marketing and engagement platform with in-app messaging, push, and A/B testing for enterprise apps.

seo.title: Swrve — Push / In-app Messaging SDK
seo.meta_description: Swrve: Swrve — real-time mobile marketing and engagement platform with in-app messaging, push, and A/B testing for enterprise apps.

when_to_use: Real-time in-app messaging triggered by user behavior events
Enterprise A/B testing for mobile app onboarding flows
Push + in-app combined campaigns for enterprise mobile apps

pros: Real-time messaging for large mobile audiences
Strong A/B testing across in-app and push
Trusted by enterprise gaming and telco brands
cons: UI and docs feel mature but dated
Overlap with Braze and Airship at similar cost
review.verdict: Credible enterprise mobile engagement suite, but Braze and Airship set the bar in this tier now.
review.best_for: Enterprise mobile teams in gaming, telco, or media
review.not_for: SMB or product-led SaaS without a dedicated CRM team

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales — no explicit peak-lock evidence
